rationale.R1.2: Strengthening the piece may require tightening the logical case: the causal chain from the training-trace construction → fine-tuning → in-line decoding → morphological agreement benefit is currently asserted rather than argued; closing those inferential gaps would make the piece materially stronger.
rationale.R1.6: The most natural reading of 'make this stronger' for a written research artifact is prose-level improvement — more confident and precise sentences, elimination of hedging, sharper paragraph openings, and better signposting. This is load-bearing: failure to improve sentence and paragraph quality would leave the delegation unfulfilled regardless of other changes.
